description: Search for venues that can accommodate a party of 8 or fewer people.
success_criterion: Returns at least one venue option with party_size <=8.

description: Calculate the cost for the selected venue from the search results.
success_criterion: Cost is successfully calculated for the chosen venue.

description: Hand off the corrected booking data to the structured half for approval.
success_criterion: Structured half accepts the handoff and processes the booking.
